title: AI Fundamentals
subtitle: Understand concepts, think critically
description: The core building blocks of modern AI, compact and without prior knowledge. By the end, you understand how language models work internally and can evaluate new AI systems with a critical eye.
goal: Understand how modern language models work at a fundamental level, and evaluate AI systems in everyday life with a critical eye.
behavioralAnchorTemplate: When I encounter a new AI application, I apply the concepts from this learning path to evaluate it critically.

steps.title: What AI actually is
steps.reflection: What changed in your understanding of AI after this course?
steps.adaptiveHint: Look again at the distinction between rule-based systems and learning systems. That difference is the foundation everything else builds on.

steps.title: How LLMs work
steps.reflection: In your own words: what does it mean that a language model predicts the next token?
steps.adaptiveHint: The concept of next-token prediction is central. Once you understand why LLMs always predict just one step at a time, a lot else falls into place.

steps.title: Mid-path reflection
steps.prompt: You now know what AI is and how language models work at a basic level. Explain in your own words: how does a language model decide which word comes next?
steps.hint: Think about patterns in training data and the concept of probability distributions over tokens.

steps.title: The AI Model Landscape
steps.reflection: Which model category fits a concrete use case in your own work or life, and why?
steps.adaptiveHint: Think about the trade-offs between model size, speed, and capability. There is rarely one right answer.

steps.title: AI Fundamentals
steps.reflection: Which concept from this course was genuinely new to you, and how does it connect to what you learned in the earlier steps?
steps.adaptiveHint: Pay particular attention to the last two lessons on context and limits, and on what comes after the chat. That is where things get interesting.

steps.title: Final reflection
steps.prompt: You have completed the path. If someone asked you to explain how a modern AI system works, what would you say, and which limitations would you point out?
steps.hint: Draw on all four courses: what AI is, how LLMs predict, the model landscape, and what context and agents add to the picture.
